meta.title: MindFlow — AI mood journal for students & professionals
meta.description: Reduce stress pattern blind spots by up to 40%. MindFlow helps students and young professionals track mood, spot triggers, and act early with AI-powered journaling.

video.title: See MindFlow in action
video.description: A 2-minute walkthrough of journaling, AI insights, habit tracking, and clinical exports—so you know exactly what you get before signing up.
video.bullet1: Daily mood logging with NLP tagging

hero.headingBefore: Reduce stress blind spots by up to
hero.description: MindFlow turns daily journaling into actionable emotional intelligence—so you spot burnout triggers before they escalate, without needing a therapist on speed dial.
hero.stat1Label: faster pattern detection vs. manual journaling
hero.stat2Label: daily check-in to stay on track
hero.cardText: Finished my thesis draft. Stress dropped after a 5-minute breathing exercise MindFlow suggested.

problem.title: You can't fix what you can't see
problem.description: Students and young professionals face chronic stress—but most only notice it when it's already overwhelming.
problem.item1Text: Mood swings and fatigue pile up for weeks before you connect the dots.
problem.item2Text: One-size-fits-all meditations don't match your actual triggers or schedule.
problem.item3Text: Therapists need structured history—not scattered notes in your phone.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to emotional clarity
howItWorks.description: From a 2-minute daily log to insights you can act on—or share with your psychologist.
howItWorks.step1Text: Write freely or pick a mood. NLP tags themes like exams, sleep, or relationships automatically.
howItWorks.step2Text: See weekly trends, stress triggers, and habit correlations in visual dashboards.
howItWorks.step3Text: Get breathing guides when stress spikes. Export PDF/CSV reports for clinical sessions (Premium).

differentiation.title: Built for depth—not another generic diary
differentiation.description: What sets us apart from standard mood trackers and meditation apps.
differentiation.item1Text: Understands context in your entries—not just emoji picks.
differentiation.item2Text: Habit goals adjust when your stress level rises, so you don't burn out chasing streaks.
differentiation.item3Text: Structured PDF histories and raw CSV for your therapist or personal analysis.
differentiation.item4Text: Breathing and meditation guides triggered by your real patterns—not random notifications.

features.title: Everything you need for emotional clarity
features.subtitle: Scan-friendly tools designed for busy students and professionals.
features.f1Text: Interactive diary with NLP that surfaces themes and sentiment.
features.f2Text: Goals that adapt when stress increases—no guilt-driven streaks.
features.f3Text: Breathing and meditation guides when you need them most.
features.f4Text: Mood calendar and word cloud to spot patterns at a glance.

analytics.title: Turn emotions into decisions
analytics.description: Weekly mood trends and trigger maps so you optimize rest, study, and work—not guess.

pricing.title: Plans that grow with you
pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you need clinical exports and advanced analytics.
pricing.freemiumTagline: Everything you need to start building self-awareness.
pricing.pp2Text: Structured clinical histories for your psychologist
pricing.pp3Text: Raw data for Excel or personal analysis

team.title: Built by people who care about mental wellness
team.description: A multidisciplinary team combining psychology, engineering, and product design.

cta.title: Ready to understand your emotions?
cta.text: Join students and professionals who use MindFlow to spot stress early and build lasting self-awareness.

footer.description: MindFlow helps you understand emotions, protect wellbeing, and grow with clarity—powered by AI, designed for privacy.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.s1Text: By accessing or using MindFlow (the "Service"), you agree to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, do not use the Service. MindFlow is designed for personal emotional wellness and self-reflection; it does not replace professional medical or psychological care.
terms.s2Text: You must be at least 16 years old to use MindFlow. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for all activity under your account. Provide accurate information when registering and notify us promptly of unauthorized access.
terms.s3Text: You may use MindFlow for lawful personal purposes only. You must not misuse the Service, attempt to access other users' data, reverse engineer the app, or upload content that is illegal, harmful, or infringes third-party rights. AI-generated insights are informational and not clinical diagnoses.
terms.s4Text: Freemium features are provided at no cost. Premium features require a paid subscription billed monthly unless otherwise stated. Prices may change with reasonable notice. Refunds are handled according to the app store or payment provider policies applicable to your purchase.
terms.s5Text: Your journal entries and mood data belong to you. We process data as described in our Privacy Policy. Export features (PDF/CSV) are provided for your personal use and sharing with professionals you choose. You are responsible for how you share exported data.
terms.s6Text: MindFlow is provided "as is" without warranties of uninterrupted or error-free operation. To the maximum extent permitted by law, MindFlow and its team are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the Service, including decisions made based on AI insights.
terms.s7Text: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. For questions: support@mindflow.app.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: We collect information you provide (journal entries, mood logs, habits, account email) and technical data (device type, app version, anonymized usage analytics) to operate and improve MindFlow.
privacy.s2Text: Data is used to deliver core features, generate AI-powered insights, personalize interventions, process subscriptions, and maintain security. We do not sell your personal journal content to third parties.
privacy.s3Text: Data is stored on secure servers with encryption in transit and at rest where applicable. Access is restricted to authorized personnel for support and maintenance only.
privacy.s4Text: You may access, export, or delete your data from the app settings or by contacting support@mindflow.app. Depending on your region, you may have additional rights under GDPR or similar laws.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device. MindFlow's website may use essential cookies for language preference and session functionality.
cookies.s2Text: Essential: mindflow-locale (stores EN/ES preference). Analytics (optional): anonymized visit statistics if enabled. We do not use cookies to read your journal content.
cookies.s3Text: You can clear cookies in your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may reset your language preference on the landing page.
